title: allBIO 25 Litre Extra Thick Compostable Food Waste Kitchen & Kerbside Bin Bags - 75 Liners
features: Up to 33% thicker than other brands thereby preventing leakage and damage.
Save up to 42% compared to leading supermarkets, offering exceptional value.
Certified to EN-13432 and carry the European standard Seedling logo.
For local council food waste recycling collection service or home composting.
description: allBIO 25L Extra Thick Compostable Food Waste Kitchen & Kerbside Bin Bags - Pack of 75 Contents: 3 rolls of compostable bags – 25 bags per roll. Bag Size: 25 Litre – Approx. 120cm rim x 58cm length with a gathered base. Designed for Strength These liners feature a Star Base , where the bottom is gathered and sealed for added strength. This design helps prevent the liner from breaking when full of food waste without affecting the overall capacity. More Information All our bin liners are certified compostable according to the European standard EN-13432 and bear the Seedling logo.
